prompt:
Scene:
A controlled black studio macro setup for high-speed photography: pure black background, glossy black reflective tray, cool blue rim light from the back right, clean white flash from the front left, and sparse silver dust particles frozen in the air.

Subject:
a single clear acrylic cube on a glossy black tray with suspended silver dust particles around it, centered in a square frame. The main cube fills about 52% of the image width and remains the anchor object; the surrounding impact material or particles should change per image while the base object and studio setup stay consistent.

Important details:
Photorealistic high-speed studio photograph, millionth-of-a-second freeze, macro lens, razor-sharp suspended particles, realistic acrylic refraction, controlled specular highlights, deep black negative space, establish the exact black studio, macro lens, acrylic transparency, rim light, tray reflection, and particle style.

Use case:
One image in a ten-image reference-dependent Prompt Atlas series. Image 01 establishes the reference object and images 02-10 use it as an image-to-image reference to test queue dependency handling and consistent object identity. Square 1:1 crop-safe gallery card.

Constraints:
No text, no watermark, no logo, no human hands, no visible weapon or launcher, no blood, no animals, no cartoon style, no CGI look, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Reference Rig
description: Reference Rig is part of a reference-dependent acrylic cube continuity series.
